posts.text:
Tulsi Gabbard says she did “not” participate in domestic law enforcement activities when she was on the scene of an FBI operation to seize ballots in Fulton County

So why was she there? Watch her struggle to explain:

Video

Senate Republicans refuse to hold open hearings on the Iran War and its mounting costs.

Tonight, I joined my Democratic colleagues in forcing that transparency. 

We will continue to demand answers from the administration, and an end to the war.

TSA agents could've gotten their paychecks for the first time in a month starting TODAY.

But Senate Republicans blocked our effort.

Your wait times at the airport and TSA employees missing meals are a cost they are willing to pay. It isn’t right.


Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock (@SenatorWarnock)

Senate Republicans just blocked my bill that would have paid TSA workers.

My Republican colleagues are saying that if you don't give the President's overgrown paramilitary force of masked agents m

The economy is not working for millions of Americans. Trump's Presidency has made the problem so much worse. 

Don't just take my word for it. Take it from Linda:

Video

I commend the courage of these women for coming forward and sharing their agonizing stories of exploitation, sexual assault, and lifelong trauma.

This is a heartbreaking revelation, and my thoughts are with all survivors who will feel the terrible weight of this new reporting. 

The legacy of UFW promoting equitable and fair treatment for our farm workers is not the province of any one person, including Cesar Chavez. 

The work that the organizers and leaders of UFW continue to do today is abso

Senate Republicans and Trump want to make it harder for you to vote.

We're pushing back. 

Tune in as I hold the Senate floor to BLOCK the SAVE Act and protect our most sacred constitutional right. The right to vote.

Watch:  nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1nxeLybrY…

Rather than saving America from being dragged into a forever war, Senate Republicans would rather focus on their so-called SAVE America Act.

Here's how dangerous this voter suppression bill would be for your right to vote:

Video

From Southern California to the Bay Area to the Sierra Nevada mountains, California's natural beauty never ceases to amaze me. 

Check out the beautiful superblooms happening across the Golden state this spring. 

visitcalifornia.com/experien…

The true financial cost of the Iran War is hard to quantify, but the billions we’ve already spent could’ve been used on hospitals and health care, or lowering other costs for Americans. 

Not to mention the increased price at the pump.

Video

Congratulations to Sinners and One Battle After Another on their many well-deserved #Oscars wins!

Two homegrown productions, shot in the U.S., which demonstrate the excellence of our domestic film industry and workers.

Here’s what President Trump has to say about the servicemembers he’s sending to war with Iran…

Video

The Liar in Chief is at it again.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Trump: "You go to California, they send out like 38 million ballots. Some Democrats get 7, 8 ballots. Republicans are a lot of times calling in, 'Where's my ballot? Where's my ballot?' They're lucky to get one."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033647495788548246#m

Brendan Carr is abusing his position to bully news networks into favorable coverage for the president.

This is just the latest attempt to intimidate and censor free speech by an administration that is tightening its authoritarian grip on our country. 

In the face of a war no one wanted, it is more important than ever to fight back against their partisan, purposeful assaults on press freedom.


Brendan Carr (@BrendanCarrFCC)

Broadcasters that are running hoaxes and news distortions - also know

The American public deserves to hear why we're at war with Iran. It's time to bring top Trump officials under oath in Congress to tell the truth about this illegal war.

Video

The American people want to know when this war will end.

But, depending on the day, we’re getting different answers from this administration.

Video

My top priority in Congress is bringing down costs for Californians — especially their housing costs. 

But the guy living in the White House doesn't seem to share that priority.

Video

Getting to host Californians at the Capitol with @SenAlexPadilla is one of my favorite parts of the job. 

Thanks to everyone who stopped by!

$11 billion on Trump's illegal war in Iran. And counting. That no American wants to spend.

Where are the billions for housing, hospitals, or health care that the American people actually want?

Video

Tulsi Gabbard says she did “not” participate in domestic law enforcement activities when she was on the scene of an FBI operation to seize ballots in Fulton County

So why was she there? Watch her struggle to explain:

Senate Republicans refuse to hold open hearings on the Iran War and its mounting costs.

Tonight, I joined my Democratic colleagues in forcing that transparency. 

We will continue to demand answers from the administration, and an end to the war.

The economy is not working for millions of Americans. Trump's Presidency has made the problem so much worse. 

Don't just take my word for it. Take it from Linda:
The work that the organizers and leaders of UFW continue to do today is absolutely essential, and especially now, when immigrants and farmworker communities are under assault.
The legacy of UFW promoting equitable and fair treatment for our farm workers is not the province of any one person, including Cesar Chavez.

I commend the courage of these women for coming forward and sharing their agonizing stories of exploitation, sexual assault, and lifelong trauma. This is a heartbreaking revelation, and my thoughts are with all survivors who will feel the terrible weight of this new reporting.

Senate Republicans and Trump want to make it harder for you to vote.

We're pushing back. 

Tune in as I hold the Senate floor to BLOCK the SAVE Act and protect our most sacred constitutional right. The right to vote.

Watch: 
youtube.com/live/DFaiTeG...

Rather than saving America from being dragged into a forever war, Senate Republicans would rather focus on their so-called SAVE America Act.

Here's how dangerous this voter suppression bill would be for your right to vote:

From Southern California to the Bay Area to the Sierra Nevada mountains, California's natural beauty never ceases to amaze me. 

Check out the beautiful superblooms happening across the Golden state this spring. 

www.visitcalifornia.com/experience/w...

The true financial cost of the Iran War is hard to quantify, but the billions we’ve already spent could’ve been used on hospitals and health care, or lowering other costs for Americans. 

Not to mention the increased price at the pump.

Congratulations to Sinners and One Battle After Another on their many well-deserved #Oscars wins!

Two homegrown productions, shot in the U.S., which demonstrate the excellence of our domestic film industry and workers.
Here’s what President Trump has to say about the servicemembers he’s sending to war with Iran…

Getting to host Californians at the Capitol with @padilla.senate.gov is one of my favorite parts of the job. 

Thanks to everyone who stopped by!

$11 billion on Trump's illegal war in Iran. And counting. That no American wants to spend.

Where are the billions for housing, hospitals, or health care that the American people actually want?

The cost of building a new hospital is about $100 million. 

We're dropping the equivalent of 10 hospitals a day on Iran.

Trump decided this war was a better use of taxpayer money than giving Americans health care. It’s not.

President Trump says “when oil prices go up, we make a lot of money.”

How about you?

Are you making a lot of money?

Donald Trump is demanding billions in personal payoffs from the federal government. 

It's taking abuse of taxpayer dollars to a whole new level. 

My Corruption Clawback Act would ensure that the government can get that money back when he leaves office.

Today, the Senate passed the ROAD to Housing Act, a bipartisan bill to expand the housing supply and make housing more affordable.

I was proud to vote for this bill championed by @warren.senate.gov.  

The House must pass this vital reform without delay.

There are few people in the world who have derived more benefit from our war with Iran than the Russian dictator, Vladimir Putin. 

We explain why:
www.youtube.com/watch?v=Usv0...
Can they explain that position to people in LA, Chicago, Portland, Minneapolis or anywhere else that has experienced such abuse practices? We certainly couldn't.
